title: Purple Heart Balloon, 10PCS Purple Foil Heart Balloons, 18inch Metallic Heart Shape Foil Balloons for Helium Birthday Party Decorations for Brithday Party, Valentines Day, Wedding, Anniversary
features: 10 PCS PURPLE FOIL HEART BALLOONS: Package contains 10 x 18 inch Purple heart balloons, 1 x 10m ribbon.The Purple heart shape balloons are specially shaped, the perfect size for your holiday or party decorating needs, together create a fun and surprising party, leave an unforgettable smile!

HIGH QUALITY FOIL BALLOONS: The surface of the heart balloons is a metal matte surface. All materials of heart balloons are of high quality and good safety foil, which is very durable, harmless, not easy to break and last a long time, glossy, beautiful in shape. Our foil heart shape balloon set can create an exclusive sweet atmosphere for party.

EASY TO USE: These Purple heart birthday balloons can be filled with air and helium (Inflate to 85%-90%, in case it is too large and explodes).The valve seals automatically when inflated, the gas inside can be emptied with a plastic straw, which can be reused later.Purple valentines balloons set have 10 meters ribbon, you can decorate your room with balloons.

WIDELY APPLICABLE: This purple foil love balloons set is suitable for birthday parties, valentine day decoration, wedding party, bridal shower, princess party, new year, anniversary, etc. They are perfect for balloon bouquets, home and table decor, wedding aisle decoration, photo background, party supplies, and more.

CUSTOMER SERVICE: Please inflate the balloons carefully and keep them away from sharp objects and excessive heat. For safety, ensure they are used under adult supervision. If you have any questions about our heart foil balloons, feel free to ask us.

Warm Reminder About balloon color Please note that there may be some differences in the color of our heart-shaped balloons under different light, but it does not affect the appearance. About balloon inflation Please do not over-inflate the off-white heart balloons, 80%-90% is fine. About avoiding bursting Please avoid exposing the heart shaped foil balloons to direct sunlight, sharp objects and excessive friction, or they will burst. About service If you have any questions or problems with our balloons, please feel free to let us know, we will deal with it for you in time.
